title: agrostis hendersonii
intro: Agrostis hendersonii, also known as Henderson's bentgrass, is a type of grass species native to the Hawaiian Islands. The medicinal properties of Agrostis hendersonii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may be attributed to the presence of certain bioactive compounds. Consuming Agrostis hendersonii has been associated with various health benefits, including improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. However, further research is needed to fully understand the effects of Agrostis hendersonii on human health, and it is often prepared as a tea or tincture by herbalists.
